error.title: Monotributo data unavailable
error.description: We couldn't load your Monotributo standing. Check your connection and try again.

categoryError.unknown: That category isn't recognized. Pick one from the list.
categoryError.generic: We couldn't update your category. Try again.

meter.invoicedEyebrow: Invoiced this period · counts toward limit
meter.ariaLabel: {{percent}} of the Category {{category}} annual limit used
meter.projectedToReach: Projected to reach the ceiling around <month>{{month}}</month>
meter.landsInNote: Lands in Category {{category}} — you'd recategorize at the next review.

ladder.title: Where you land on the scale
ladder.subtitle: Annual gross-income ceiling per category
ladder.gapNote: Intermediate categories omitted on this view

scale.title: Monotributo 2026 — full scale
scale.subtitle: Official scale, in effect since February 1, 2026 · next review Jul / Aug 2026
scale.footnote: The fee includes the tax component, the SIPA (pension) contribution, and the health-insurance contribution. Values are rounded; exact amounts (with cents) are on the ARCA site. Since 2026 the scale runs up to category K for both services and goods.

projection.title: The projection, broken down
projection.noteMoves: Moving to Category {{projected}} {{direction}} your monthly fee <fee>{{from}} → {{to}}</fee>. Easing your pace keeps you in Category {{current}}.
projection.noteSteady: At this pace you stay in Category {{current}} — monthly fee <fee>{{fee}}</fee>.

invoices.title: The {{n}} invoices behind this
invoices.subtitle: Income invoiced in 2026, oldest first — watch the annual total build.

comparison.title: Compared to the previous period
comparison.empty: No prior period to compare yet. Once a full prior trailing-12-month window exists, you'll see how this period stacks up against it here.
comparison.subtitle: Prior trailing-12-month window ending {{date}}
